Class-Cleric 20 — Male Human Cleric: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 8 (-1) Wisdom: 18 (+4) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: Celtic-Arawn (NE)
Ability Boosts: Intelligence: 2; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 689118/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Blessed Strikes); Cleric (Cleric Subclass); Cleric (Divine Order)
Feats: Alert; Archery; Boon Of Spell Recall; Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Druid); Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Cleric Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Blessed Healer; Blessed Strikes; Channel Divinity; Cleric Subclass; Disciple Of Life; Divine Intervention; Divine Order; Divine Spark; Divine Strike; Epic Boon; Greater Divine Intervention; Improved Blessed Strikes; Life Domain Spells; Life Domain; Potent Spellcasting; Preserve Life; Protector; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Sear Undead; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting; Supreme Healing; Thaumaturge; Turn Undead; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Blessed Strikes: 1 selection
Cleric Subclass: 1 selection
Divine Order: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Deception; History; Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Religion
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +10 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) -1 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +9 Medicine: (wis) +10 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +7 Nature: (int) +5 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +10 Survival: (wis) +4
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thaumaturge: +4 Arcana/+4 Religion
Combat
Hit Points: 121 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Club (+9 1d4+3 B; Slow); Dagger (+9 1d4+3 P R20/60; Nick); Sickle (+9 1d4+3 S; Nick); Unarmed (+9 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Improved Blessed Strikes: Has increased Divine Strike effects
Protector: Armor Training (Heavy)/Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Divine Spark: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 4d8 hit points or to inflict 4d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant (save Constitution half)
Divine Strike: Weapon inflicts +2d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant once per turn
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Sear Undead: Successful Turn Undead also inflicts 4d8 HP radiant
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 18 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: -1; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +10
Magic
Spell Slots: C0: 6; C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 3; C6: 2; C7: 2; C8: 1; C9: 1 Attack: C: +10; D: +10 Spell DC: C: 18; D: 18
Spells:
Aid (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Antimagic Field (C8 Abju): 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Aura Of Life (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Banishment (C4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Bless (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Ench): R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saving throws for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blindness/Deafness (C2 Necr): 1
Contagion (C5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either ends after three saves or extends to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Cure Wounds (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched regains 2d8+4 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 HP]
Death Ward (C4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Death Ward (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Dispel Magic (C3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divination (C4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divine Word (C7 Evoc): R30' Inflicts death on targets with up to 20 HP, stunned on those with up to 30 HP, blinded on those with up to 40 HP, and deafened on those with up to 50 HP, and forces them to return to their home planes (save Charisma negates)
Enhance Ability (C2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Fire Storm (C7 Evoc): R150' 10 connected 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Gate (C9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Guidance (C0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target within 1 rd [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Hallow (C5 Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect (save Charisma negates)
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): R30' 12 diners gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Hold Person (C2 Ench): R60' Paralyzes the target humanoid (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Inflict Wounds (C1 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (C5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Lesser Restoration (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blindness, deafness, paralysis, or poison
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+4 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Healing Word (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 1d4+4 HP [+Level restores +2d4 HP]
Mending (C0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1'
Remove Curse (C3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Revivify (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 4d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates)
Sanctuary (C1 Abju): R30' Foes of the target cannot attack it (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min; target attacking ends
Shield Of Faith (C1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): R120' Target dying creature becomes stable
Speak With Dead (C3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): R30' Creates minor magic effects—a booming voice, modification of flames, harmless tremors, an illusory sound, movement of a door or window, or a change in eye appearance—for 1 min
True Seeing (C6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
Wish (C9 [Greater Divine Intervention] Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or otherwise alters reality with few limits
Magic Notes:
Thaumaturge: Knows +1 Cleric cantrip
Blessed Healer: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores 2 + spell level hit points to self
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 4 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Disciple Of Life: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores an additional 2 + spell level hit points
Divine Intervention: Can cast a level 5 Cleric spell without using a spell slot or material components once per long rest
Greater Divine Intervention: Can use Divine Intervention to cast Wish; requires 2d4 long rests before using Divine Intervention again
Improved Blessed Strikes: Damaging cantrips give 8 temporary hit points to a target within 60'
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Potent Spellcasting: Cleric cantrips inflict +4 HP
Preserve Life: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 100 hit points among targets, raising each to up to half its maximum hit points
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Supreme Healing: Healing spells restore the maximum possible hit points
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 3 available vs. 5 allocated
